extraction_reasoning: The risk section contains no litigation summary table; it only refers generally to involvement in legal proceedings and to an Outstanding Litigations section not provided, so no criminal, regulatory, tax, or quantified against-company litigation rows were counted, and no “By” rows were counted. The contingent-liabilities table is stated in Rs. millions and its latest disclosed period is the nine months ended December 31, 2005; the stated Total row is Rs. 748.77 million, converted to Rs. 74.877 crore (748.77 ÷ 10). The 87.44% road-project concentration is described as approximately the Company’s revenues, but no fiscal period or denominator is specified; it is not a top-five or top-ten customer concentration disclosure. Monetary source units in the relevant tables are Rs. millions, converted to crore using 1 crore = 10 million.
